summary: Comprehensive testing of production optimization features for Polymarket trading bot. Backend: 29/29 tests passed. Frontend: All UI features verified working (Arbitrage page diagnostics, Analytics Signal Quality + Watchdog tabs). All requested features functioning correctly.

issues: Weather bucket shows 54/25 active (over max limit of 25) - this is a data issue, UI displays correctly

backend_api_tests: GET /api/analytics/strategy-tracker returns 200 with performance, rejections, signals, watchdog, position_slots - PASS
GET /api/analytics/signal-quality returns per-strategy signal counts with rejection reasons (tte, insufficient_vol_data, edge) - PASS
GET /api/analytics/watchdog returns last_new_market_at, last_trade_opened_at, last_trade_closed_at timestamps + thresholds - PASS
GET /api/strategies/arb/diagnostics returns markets_scanned=1807, binary_pairs_found=500, multi_outcome_groups_found=67, raw_edges, rejection_log - PASS
GET /api/strategies/arb/health returns multi_groups_scanned=67 in diagnostics, total_scans - PASS
GET /api/strategies/weather/health returns markets_classified=65 (after scanner runs), gamma_events_discovered=759 - PASS
GET /api/strategies/weather/stations returns 17 global cities (London, Tokyo, Seoul, Hong Kong, Paris, Singapore, Buenos Aires, Toronto + US cities) - PASS
Position slot diagnostics show weather_count=54, nonweather_count=11, headroom, by_strategy, blocked_by_position_limit - PASS
frontend_ui_tests: Arbitrage page shows stat cards: Markets Scanned (1807), Binary Pairs (500), Multi-Outcome (67), Raw Edges, Eligible, Executed, Last Scan - PASS
Arbitrage page Diagnostics tab shows Recent Raw Edges (Pre-Filter) table with multi_outcome type entries - PASS
Arbitrage page Diagnostics tab shows Recent Rejections (Post-Filter) table with reason column - PASS
Analytics page has Signal Quality and Watchdog tabs - PASS
Analytics > Signal Quality shows CRYPTO SNIPER rejection reasons: insufficient_vol_data (484), tte (66) - PASS
Analytics > Signal Quality shows Position Slots section with Weather Bucket (54/25), Non-Weather Bucket (11/25), Global (65/65) - PASS
Analytics > Signal Quality shows Blocked by Position Limit: global (36), weather (9) - PASS
Analytics > Watchdog shows Discovery Watchdog with Last New Market, Last Trade Opened, Last Trade Closed + thresholds - PASS
Analytics > Watchdog shows Strategy Performance (Tracker) for all strategies with P&L, Trades, Win Rate, W/L - PASS
Dashboard Overview shows live data with auto-refresh (P&L chart updates, stat cards show current values) - PASS

features_verified.Position slot segmentation (max_weather=: PASS - API returns correct limits, UI shows weather_count/nonweather_count with headroom
features_verified.Dashboard auto-refresh via WebSocket: PASS - Uptime counter increments, data refreshes without manual reload
features_verified.Arb scanner debug - root cause zero trad: PASS - diagnostics endpoint shows raw_edges, rejection_log with reasons (stale data, net_edge < min)
features_verified.Arb scanner multi-outcome markets: PASS - multi_outcome_groups_found=67, raw_edges include multi_outcome type entries
features_verified.Weather strategy global expansion: PASS - Stations endpoint returns 17 cities including London, Tokyo, Seoul, Hong Kong, etc.
features_verified.Signal quality + rejection visibility vi: PASS - /api/analytics/signal-quality returns tte, insufficient_vol_data counts; UI displays in Signal Quality tab
features_verified.Discovery watchdog alerts: PASS - /api/analytics/watchdog returns timestamps with thresholds (30/60/120 min)

critical_code_review_comments: Weather bucket showing 54 positions active vs max 25 - this is EXPECTED behavior since existing positions don't get closed when limit is reduced. The risk engine correctly blocks NEW weather positions.
Active Strategies on Overview page shows 'stopped' for all - this is a known pre-existing display issue per main agent context note
seed_data_creation: None - tested with live MongoDB data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All production optimization features verified working: (1) Position slot segmentation shows weather_count=54, nonweather_count=11, with correct limits and blocked counts. (2) Signal quality API returns rejection reasons including tte, insufficient_vol_data - visible in UI. (3) Arb diagnostics shows multi_outcome_groups_found=67 with raw_edges and rejection_log. (4) Weather strategy has global expansion with 17 stations including international cities. (5) Watchdog timestamps and thresholds are tracked. Note: Weather health stats reset on server restart - wait for scan_interval (60s) for data.
